summary: A recorded clip, posted by the account, of a man with white-gray hair in a dark suit and purple tie speaking at a lectern bearing the presidential seal on a dark stage. 'TURNING POINT ACTION' logos appear at the left and right of the backdrop. The framing holds a single steady wide shot across the sampled frames.

script.scene: A man in a dark suit and purple tie speaks at a lectern with the presidential seal; 'TURNING POINT ACTION' logos flank the dark backdrop.
The same steady wide shot of the speaker at the lectern continues.

notable_text: TURNING POINT ACTION; SEAL OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES
